content:
来一把紧张刺激的「相位对弈」？轮到你出牌了！
由守密人们自发组成的赛事组竭诚举办的赛事活动「N厨杯」将于5月22日正式开赛，届时Bilibili、Discord双平台将同步开启直播！本着“输赢不重要，快乐最重要”的宗旨，主办方欢迎所有人报名参赛~

🙌 **赛事流程**
🔹 报名时间：5月1日-5月15日
🔹 报名方式：点击链接（https://docs.qq.com/form/page/DSnp6ZnBTU0R1cE1N ）填写报名表
🔹 比赛时间：自5月22日起 每周五/六/日19:00-22:00（UTC+8）
🔹 直播链接
Bilibili @God7777：https://space.bilibili.com/22359359
Discord语音频道“全球-N厨杯”：https://discord.gg/CbPTHnSAaF

📑 **赛事规则**
本届赛事将采用“分组积分赛+单败淘汰赛”的赛制。
🔹 分组积分赛：所有参赛选手随机分组，每组7~8人，组内进行瑞士轮Bo1，胜者积1分，败者不积分。每组的第一名直接出线，第二名与第三名进行Bo3、胜者出线。
🔹 单败淘汰赛：所有出线选手随机匹配进行Bo3。两名败者额外进行1次Bo3争夺季军。
每场对局开始之前，主办方将会为对战双方随机3套卡组，每套卡组只展现其中的1个角色、1个命轮。对战双方依次选择1套卡组展开对局，先选的选手在下场对局中将后选。

🎁 **赛事奖励**
🥇 冠军：50元奖金
🥈 亚军：30元奖金
🏅 四强：头像框·维度桂冠

😆 **笑声制造奖**
所有打出令人捧腹大笑的操作的选手将入选“名人堂”并获得特别奖金，其中1名选手可获得50元奖金与至高称号，另有9名选手可分别获得5元奖金。

👍 **友情赞助奖**
🔹 感谢来自守密人“killer231x2317”的赞助：伤害结算页出现数字“231”可获得23.1元奖金。
🔹 感谢来自守密人“弥大墙”的赞助：在单场对局中，使用雷娅击败对手2名角色，或雷娅为伤害第二高的角色可获得8.88元奖金（仅限本届赛事前2次达成该条件时获奖）。
🔹 感谢来自守密人“弥大墙”的赞助：在本届赛事中第1位击败守密人“维克多”的选手可获得6.23元奖金（如“维克多”夺冠则由“维克多”获得6.23元奖金）。
🔹 感谢来自守密人“维克多”的赞助：在半决赛与总决赛中击败守密人“维克多”可获得20元奖金，在其他对局中击败守密人“维克多”可获得10元奖金。

在此，感谢每一位积极组织、踊跃参与「N厨杯」的守密人！祝各位玩得开心🍻~
💡 本届赛事活动「N厨杯」中的所有奖金均由主办方与赞助者提供，主办方拥有本活动的最终解释权。
thread_title: 🏆 忘却前夜第4届N厨杯┊The 4th 「N」′s Chef Cup of Morimens

content:
Want to play a tense and exciting "Traphase"? It's your turn to play a card!

The 「N」′s Chef Cup, a tournament organized by Keepers, will officially begin on May 22nd (UTC+8). Live streams will be available simultaneously on Bilibili and Discord! With the motto "Winning or losing isn't important, having fun is!", the organizers welcome everyone to register and participate!

🙌 **Tournament Process**
🔹 Registration Period: May 1st - May 15th (UTC+8)
🔹 Registration Method: Click on the link (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd-r1rcyWt3s1gjDMBUPPaYRYzAeeev27FIIOFhtzHhYh0sZw/viewform?usp=publish-editor) to complete the registration form.
🔹 Competition Time: Starting May 22nd  (UTC+8), every Friday/Saturday/Sunday 19:00-22:00 (UTC+8)
🔹 Live Stream Links
Bilibili @God7777: https://space.bilibili.com/22359359
Discord Voice Channel "GLOBAL-N′sChefCup": https://discord.gg/CbPTHnSAaF

📑** Tournament Rules**
This tournament will adopt a "Group Stage + Knockout Stage" format.
🔹 Group Stage: All participants are randomly grouped into 7-8 players per group. Within each group, a Swiss-system Bo1 tournament is held, with the winner earning 1 point and the loser receiving no points. The 1st place in each group advances directly, while the 2nd place and 3rd place play a Bo3 tournament, with the winner advancing.
🔹 Knockout Stage: All advancing players are randomly matched for a Bo3 tournament. The two losers play an additional Bo3 tournament to determine third place.
Before each match, the organizers will randomly select 3 decks for both players. Each deck will only display one Awakener and one Wheel of Destiny. Players will take turns selecting one deck for the next match; the player who selects first will select second in the following match.
thread_title: 🏆 忘却前夜第4届N厨杯┊The 4th 「N」′s Chef Cup of Morimens

content:
🎁 **Tournament Rewards**
🥇 Champion: 50 RMB
🥈 Runner-up: 30 RMB
🏅 Top 4: Avatar Frame-Dimensional Laurels

😆 **Laughter Maker Award**
All players who execute hilarious plays will be inducted into the "Hall of Fame" and receive a special bonus. One player will receive 50 RMB and supreme title, and nine other players will each receive 5 RMB.

👍 **Sponsorship Award**
🔹 Thanks to the Keeper "killer231x2317" for sponsoring: A reward of 23.1 RMB will be given for displaying the number "231" on the damage calculation page.
🔹 Thanks to the Keeper "弥大墙" for sponsoring: A reward of 8.88 RMB will be given for defeating two opponent characters with Leigh in a single match, or for Leigh being the 2nd highest damage dealer (only awarded for the first two times this condition is met).
🔹 Thanks to the Keeper "弥大墙" for sponsoring: The first player to defeat the patron "维克多" in this tournament will receive a prize of 6.23 RMB (if "维克多" wins the tournament, "维克多" will receive the 6.23 RMB prize).
🔹 Thanks to the Keeper "维克多" for sponsoring: Defeating "维克多" in the semifinals and finals will earn you a prize of 20 RMB, and defeating "维克多" in other matches will earn you a prize of 10 RMB.

We would like to thank every Keeper who actively organized and participated in the "「N」′s Chef Cup"! Have fun! 🍻~
💡 All bonus in this "「N」′s Chef Cup" event are provided by the organizer and sponsors. The organizer reserves the right to final interpretation of this event.

thread_title: 忘却前夜×沙耶之歌 联动预告┊Morimens × Saya No Uta Collab Preview

content:
I have a theory about the Saya no Uta collab storyline.

Humour me.

We might not get  Fuminori's Saya.

Instead, we might get one of Saya's children.

Let me explain.
Saya, by her own words, is essentially a dandelion that crossed dimensions to worlds that have intelligent life.
Saya only took over her earth after she was taught that to reproduce, love is a key ingredient, after she read multiple romance novels amongst the many others that were provided by the doctor who had found her(I forgot his name, but he acted like a father figure to Saya). 

When Saya, finally felt the sheer burning passion of love when she protected Fuminori in the true ending of the game. She then took over the planet.
 
Now, dandelions reproduce Asexually. This is important as any disabilities or adaptations received by the parent plant are passed down to the offspring exactly. 

This is important as this would make saya's children just like her and require love to reproduce and take over the world they end up in when they depart, just like dandelion seeds.

We can already deduce  from the previous Mist Sequence Collab and interviews, that the writers have the full intention of integrating the Collab characters into Morimens.
But not only as simple units to be forgotten about later on.

Because the team wants to honour all the games/franchises that are chosen to be collaborated with.

Following the lore of Saya no Uta. It would make sense that one of her children would arrive in the  world of morimens. And given the fact that she would need love to take over the planet, she would be a very safe unit to bring into the game, whilst honouring the original and tying into its lore.

But I could be wrong. And we might get one of Saya's sisters or niece who could have a very different personality all together.

content: But that'd only work if Urobuchi decided to work directly with the Morimens team to expand the lore, but I doubt it as it would likely undermine the mystery of the cosmic horror aspect surrounding saya's background
